headline: TransDigm Balances Strong Q2 Update With New Fixed Income Debt
summary: TransDigm Group (NYSE:TDG) released strong preliminary financial results for its second quarter. The company reported continued strength across both commercial and defense aerospace product lines. Alongside the results, TransDigm completed a major fixed-income offering that adds to its financing options. TransDigm is a major supplier of aircraft components, with a portfolio that spans a wide range of commercial and defense platforms. For investors watching aerospace suppliers, the...

headline: TransDigm Group Incorporated (TDG) Solid Sales Growth Supports Acquisition Push and Buyback Push
summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE:TDG) is one of the best defense stocks that will skyrocket. On April 14, TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE:TDG) reiterated it expects net sales of between $2.54 billion and $2.545 billion for the thirteen-week period ended March 28, 2026. The company also expects EBITDA of between $1.33 billion and $1.335 billion. The preliminary […]

headline: Why TransDigm (TDG) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of aerospace and defense company TransDigm (NYSE:TDG) jumped 3.8% in the afternoon session after the de-escalation of Middle East tensions improved the long-term demand forecast for commercial aviation.
